subject: Replace policy participant in clamp csit with http
commit_message:
Replace policy participant in clamp csit with http

- Clamp docker uses only http participant and sim ppnt. Policy test cases enabled only for k8s tests.
- Export of metrics to jaeger disabled to eliminate warnings in the logs
- Grafana health check timeout increased.
- Fix kafka trace query for acmr that uses spring kafka


Issue-ID: POLICY-5567
Signed-off-by: rameshiyer27 <ramesh.murugan.iyer@est.tech>
Change-Id: I38f8eddf5705d7d83107ffb24779d4448c4fe5fe
